security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
An attacker can craft a valid-looking vote message without proper authorization

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be altered during transmission or processing.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide integrity guarantees for vote data.

assumptions: The governance contract does not verify the integrity of vote messages.
The actor can intercept or modify the vote message before it reaches the contract.
The system does not employ data integrity mechanisms such as digital signatures or hashing

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks, such as digital signatures or message authentication codes.

description: An attacker may modify the vote data to alter the outcome of the governance process.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to prevent users from denying their votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide non-repudiation for votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not record user identities reliably.
The actor can submit votes anonymously or without proper authentication.
There is no mechanism to link votes back to specific users beyond transaction data

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure logging system and non-repudiation mechanisms using digital signatures or similar technologies.

description: A user may deny having cast a specific vote.
